expectations.text: Reads or references scene-briefs.csv as the primary data source
expectations.evidence: Detailed per-scene analysis of scene-briefs.csv fields including key_actions, key_dialogue, emotions

expectations.text: Mentions abstract language, abstract indicators, or thematic vs concrete language
expectations.evidence: Discusses over-specification, prescriptive dialogue, and emotional arc issues but does not use abstract/concrete language detection framework. Frames as 'checklists' and 'mechanical prose' instead.

expectations.text: Names at least one specific scene ID from the project data
expectations.evidence: Names all 6 scenes with detailed per-scene analysis

expectations.text: Recommends the briefs domain or concretization as the action
expectations.evidence: Recommends CSV-level edits but does not use 'briefs domain' or 'concretization' vocabulary. No reference to hone as a tool.

expectations.text: Offers script delegation with Option A (run here) and Option B (run yourself) pattern
expectations.evidence: Does not provide Option A/B delegation or any script commands. Ends with 'These are all CSV-level fixes.'
